creator: jthomas@crucialservers.net
text:
Our network is actually routed by PC Routers using FreeBSD. We don't use Quagga or a third party routing software. It's strictly Juniper on Border and FreeBSD on our subnets. All our company public hosting machines are FreeBSD as well as mail servers, File Servers, Desktop machines, Backup Servers and just about any machine you can think of (excluding some dedicated server and colocation customers). We also offer FreeBSD Support and Admin Time FREE.

I would love to be added to the Internet Service Provider section of this web site. Im filling this form out becasue it stated to get added to fill this out!
